channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Arizona Republicans to select nominees for governor and other top offices on Tuesday
item.description: Arizona Republicans are voting Tuesday to select candidates to challenge Democratic incumbents, as the party seeks to regain influence in the state.

item.title: Media accused of hiding anti-ICE motive behind recent left-wing violence
item.description: The incident was more than a firework set off outside a federal building, according to critics.

item.title: Alan Dershowitz withdraws from Epstein hearing, faces subpoena threat
item.description: A House panel threatened to subpoena attorney Alan Dershowitz if he does not testify under oath about his professional and personal ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: States should not replicate Congress's housing policy mistakes
item.description: Politicians may blame various parties, but the core problem remains a shortage of housing.
